name: Straight and Level
description: 60-second cruise at 10,000 ft. Altitude must hold within ±50 ft.

name: Climb
description: 120-second climb from 5,000 ft. Must reach at least 8,000 ft.

name: Descent
description: 90-second descent from 10,000 ft. Must lose at least 1,000 ft.

name: Turn Left
description: 30-second standard-rate left turn from heading 090. Must turn ≥30°.

criteria.description: Heading turned left by at least 30 degrees (≤060°)

name: Turn Right
description: 30-second standard-rate right turn from heading 000. Must turn ≥30°.

criteria.description: Heading turned right by at least 30 degrees (≥030°)

name: Combined Climb + Turn
description: 60-second combined climb and left turn. Must gain 1,000 ft and turn 15°.

criteria.description: Heading changed by at least 15 degrees left

name: Extended Cruise (FL350)
description: 10-minute cruise at FL350. Altitude and heading must remain stable.
